passage.title: Memo: Monthly Team Meeting
passage.text:
TO: All Staff
FROM: Sarah Kim, Office Manager
DATE: March 15
SUBJECT: Monthly Team Meeting

Please be informed that the monthly team meeting will be held on Friday, March 20, at 2:00 P.M. in Conference Room B.

This month's agenda includes a review of the first quarter sales report, an update on the new product launch, and a discussion about office renovation plans.

All department heads are required to attend. Other staff members are encouraged to join if their schedules permit. Please bring your departmental reports.

Light refreshments will be provided. If you have any agenda items to add, please contact me by Wednesday, March 18.

questions.question: What is the purpose of this memo?
options: A) To announce a change in office location
B) To inform staff about an upcoming meeting
C) To request first quarter sales data
D) To introduce a new office manager

questions.question: When will the meeting take place?
What are staff members asked to bring to the meeting?

grammar.title: 영어 문장의 기본 구조 — 주어(S) + 동사(V)
grammar.korean_explanation:
영어 문장은 반드시 *주어*와 *동사*가 있어야 해요.

• 주어(Subject): 문장의 주인공 → '누가 / 무엇이'
• 동사(Verb): 주어의 행동이나 상태 → '~한다 / ~이다'

한국어: '나는 공부한다' → 주어: 나는 / 동사: 공부한다
영어: 'I study.' → Subject: I / Verb: study

⚠️ 중요! 영어는 주어를 절대 생략할 수 없어요!
❌ 틀림: Studies every day. (주어 없음)
✅ 맞음: She studies every day.
grammar.english_explanation:
Every English sentence MUST have a subject and a verb.

• Subject: who or what the sentence is about
• Verb: what the subject does or is

The most basic pattern is: Subject + Verb
Example: 'She runs.' / 'He works.' / 'The meeting starts.'

⚠️ Unlike Korean, you CANNOT drop the subject in English!
Always include the subject, even when it seems obvious.
examples: The manager *works* in Seoul. (주어: The manager / 동사: works)
She *reads* every morning. (주어: She / 동사: reads)
The meeting *starts* at 9 A.M. (주어: The meeting / 동사: starts)

quiz.question: 다음 중 올바른 영어 문장은?
options: B) He works hard every day.
quiz.explanation: 영어 문장은 반드시 주어가 있어야 해요. 'He(주어) + works(동사)' 구조가 올바릅니다.

quiz.question: 'The report was submitted on time.' 에서 주어는?
영어 문장에서 반드시 필요한 두 가지 요소는?
quiz.explanation: 영어 문장의 핵심은 주어(Subject)와 동사(Verb)입니다. 나머지는 선택 요소예요.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a list of items to be discussed at a meeting
vocabulary.example: The agenda for today's meeting includes a budget review.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to present something for consideration or review
vocabulary.example: Please submit your report by Friday.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to establish the truth or make something definite
vocabulary.example: She confirmed her attendance at the conference.

vocabulary.english_meaning: the latest time by which something must be completed
vocabulary.example: The deadline for applications is next Monday.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a person you work with in the same organization
vocabulary.example: My colleague helped me finish the project on time.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a plan of activities or an arrangement of times
vocabulary.example: Let's schedule a meeting for next week.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to raise someone to a higher position or to advertise
vocabulary.example: She was promoted to senior manager after five years.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a division of a large organization
vocabulary.example: He works in the marketing department.

vocabulary.english_meaning: an estimate of income and planned expenditure
vocabulary.example: The project exceeded its budget by 20%.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to need something as a necessity
vocabulary.example: All staff are required to attend the safety training.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to examine something in detail to understand it
vocabulary.example: Scientists carefully analyzed the experimental data.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a proposed explanation that needs to be tested
vocabulary.example: The researcher tested her hypothesis with a series of experiments.

vocabulary.english_meaning: important or large enough to have an effect
vocabulary.example: The study found a significant improvement in test scores.

vocabulary.english_meaning: information that indicates whether something is true
vocabulary.example: The evidence strongly supported the scientist's theory.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a system of ideas used to explain something
vocabulary.example: Darwin's theory of evolution changed the field of biology.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to arrive at a judgment or decision after consideration
vocabulary.example: The study concluded that regular exercise improves mental health.

vocabulary.english_meaning: a fact or event observed to exist or happen
vocabulary.example: Climate change is a global phenomenon affecting all countries.

vocabulary.english_meaning: systematic investigation to discover facts
vocabulary.example: Her research focused on the effects of diet on brain function.

vocabulary.english_meaning: to show clearly that something is true
vocabulary.example: The experiment demonstrated the effects of temperature on growth.

vocabulary.english_meaning: an element that contributes to a result
vocabulary.example: Diet is an important factor in maintaining good health.

passage.explanation: 메모의 목적은 직원들에게 월간 팀 회의를 알리는 것입니다. 'Please be informed that the monthly team meeting will be held...'에서 확인할 수 있어요.
회의는 3월 20일 금요일에 열립니다. 'the monthly team meeting will be held on Friday, March 20'에서 확인할 수 있어요.
직원들은 부서 보고서를 가져오라고 요청받았습니다. 'Please bring your departmental reports'에서 확인할 수 있어요.

vocab_quiz.question: 회의의 주요 ___은 예산 검토입니다. 빈칸에 알맞은 단어는?
vocab_quiz.explanation: agenda = 의제, 안건. '회의 안건'은 'meeting agenda'라고 표현해요.

vocab_quiz.question: She was ___ to senior manager after five years. 빈칸에 알맞은 단어는?
vocab_quiz.explanation: promote = 승진시키다. 'be promoted to + 직책'은 '~로 승진하다'를 의미해요.

vocab_quiz.question: The ___ supported the scientist's theory. 빈칸에 알맞은 단어는?
vocab_quiz.explanation: evidence = 증거. '이론을 뒷받침하는 증거'는 'evidence supporting the theory'라고 표현해요.
